baseUrl.label: V3 Memory API URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL of the Memory V3 server

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context before each turn

maxResults.label: Max Results
maxResults.help: Maximum number of memory results to inject

minScore.label: Minimum Score
minScore.help: Minimum cosine similarity score (0-1) for results

prefetchTimeoutMs.label: Prefetch Timeout (ms)
prefetchTimeoutMs.help: Per-search timeout for auto-recall prefetch under load

maxInflightPrefetch.label: Max Inflight Prefetch
maxInflightPrefetch.help: Skip prefetch when concurrent prefetches exceed this limit

smartEntityLimit.label: Smart Entity Limit
smartEntityLimit.help: How many entity snapshots to query in smart prefetch mode

qualityFirstAgents.label: Quality-First Agents
qualityFirstAgents.help: Agent IDs that should prioritize recall quality over latency

qualityFirstMaxInflightPrefetch.label: Quality Max Inflight
qualityFirstMaxInflightPrefetch.help: Concurrent prefetch budget for quality-first agents

qualityFirstSmartEntityLimit.label: Quality Smart Entity Limit
qualityFirstSmartEntityLimit.help: Entity snapshot fanout for quality-first agents

prefetchFailureCooldownMs.label: Prefetch Failure Cooldown (ms)
prefetchFailureCooldownMs.help: Cooldown after prefetch failures before trying again
